creator: kargl@troutmask.apl.washington.edu
text:
The texcm-ttf is improperly installed.  After the fonts are
written into /usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/texcm-ttf/ both 
fonts.dir and fonts.scale are 0 byte files.

Fix: 

Manually run mkfontscale and mkfontdir.
How-To-Repeat: 
Install port.  Add the font path to xorg.conf.  Restart X.
and check the log file for ignored font paths.
